info.description: Editorial articles for Reset Stories, Life, Love & Relationships, Work & Money

slug.description: URL path after the slash. Lowercase, hyphens-not-spaces, no punctuation. Auto-fills from the name/title — only edit if you want to change the URL.

hero_image.description: Top banner photo for this page. Use a landscape JPG at least 1600x1000px. Smaller images will stretch and look blurry on big screens. PNG / HEIC work but JPG is half the file size.

author.description: Who wrote this. Free text. Defaults to 'Anna Lou' if blank.

reading_time.description: Reading time label. Free text. Examples: '5 min read', '10 min', 'Quick read'.

is_featured.description: Big banner article at the top of the homepage editorial section. Only one article should have this ticked at a time — most recent wins if multiple.

is_homepage_pinned.description: Pin this article to the 3-card grid on the homepage. Up to 3 pinned articles show. If fewer than 3 are pinned, the rest fill with most-recent unpinned articles. Use 'homepage_pin_order' to control which pinned ones come first.

homepage_pin_order.description: Order among pinned articles (lower number = appears first). Only used when 'is_homepage_pinned' is ticked. Leave at 0 if order does not matter.

is_free.description: If true, shows on website. If false, Substack paid only.

substack_canonical_url.description: Canonical URL on Substack for the 12 free posts

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override

shop_tags.description: Optional 'Shop the story' photos shown below the article. Each photo can link to a product with a hover tag ('Anna is wearing the [piece]'). Use sparingly — only the photos where the product is central to the story. No inline shop links in the body.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
